learning_roadmap.title: Core AI Principles & Python: {first_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Understand core neural networks or logic architectures and practice hands-on coding of {first_gap}.

learning_roadmap.title: Model/API Pipeline Integration: {second_gap}
learning_roadmap.description: Integrate pretrained models, LLMs, or data pipelines with {second_gap} to create a functional system.

learning_roadmap.title: AI Quality Control and Evaluation
learning_roadmap.description: Build an validation suite to evaluate the model's responses, measuring performance, hallucination rates, or accuracy.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI can suggest data cleaning scripts, build synthetic data, or suggest neural architectures.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human designs evaluation protocols, checks bias, and chooses target objectives.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI writes base code, helper libraries, and API calls.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human structures the prompt chaining, implements error fallbacks, and manages context windows.

ai_exposure_breakdown.ai_role: AI monitors anomaly logs and generates alert rules.
ai_exposure_breakdown.human_role: Human sets security rules, alignment guardrails, and compliance logic.

evolution_timeline.title: AI App Builder
evolution_timeline.description: Learn to connect LLM APIs or simple machine learning libraries to a frontend, shipping your first AI-augmented tool.

evolution_timeline.title: AI Systems Engineer
evolution_timeline.description: Optimize AI latency and cost through model fine-tuning, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), or vector database setups.

evolution_timeline.title: AI Architect / Lead Engineer
evolution_timeline.description: Design custom agentic architectures, multi-agent frameworks, and end-to-end model deployments for complex systems.

future_self.headline: Specialized AI/ML Developer
future_self.narrative: {name} can leverage their passion for computing by designing smart systems that combine LLMs and structured workflows. The future belongs to builders who pair AI APIs with robust engineering.
future_resume_highlights: Designed and deployed a task-oriented AI workflow using {title} concepts.
Established RAG data structures to improve query retrieval quality.
Documented AI performance validation matrices and user experience feedback.

risk_heatmap.description: Standard code templates and API integration code will be highly automated by code assistants.
Rapid changes in framework libraries and models require constant retraining and adaptability.
Highly popular entry path; standing out requires specialized vertical domain knowledge or system-level expertise.
Handling private data, model safety, and bias makes human validation and alignment highly critical.
